feedItems.description: allocated £121.7m to Adult Social Care (≈£412 per resident)
allocated £96.8m to Children's Social Care (≈£327 per resident)
allocated £24.3m to Environment & Streets (≈£82 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £123 (5.2%) to £2498
